title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine, reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience with globally distributed teams collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ is needed. Finout is a cloud cost-management company backed by $85M+ in funding.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years experience exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS RevOps expertise aligns perfectly with Head of RevOps role, strong Salesforce background, and scaling experience directly applicable to $30M+ ARR company. Tel Aviv HQ with global hybrid structure matches candidate's location preferences exactly.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of you—building the operational backbone for a cloud cost-management platform at scale, with a Tel Aviv HQ and global team, seems like a natural fit given your 15+ years scaling RevOps in B2B SaaS. With your depth in Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional GTM leadership, you'd be well-positioned to take their revenue operations from strong foundation to world-class. Would love to grab 15 minutes to discuss how your experience maps to their $85M+ funded trajectory.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations

Responsibilities include optimizing territory compositions with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance, analyzing performance and account data for segmentation, supporting GTM planning cycles, and maintaining accurate territory mapping in CRM systems like Fullcast and Salesforce. Requires a deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools), and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000–$175,000.
score_reason: Exceptional match for Omri's RevOps expertise and GTM leadership background. Role directly aligns with core competencies in territory strategy, Salesforce optimization, and B2B SaaS scaling—this is a senior-level opportunity at a category-defining platform.

I'd love to explore how my experience with Salesforce optimization, account segmentation, and cross-functional GTM planning could accelerate Gong's next phase.
